title: 1ABOVE Secure Pack 50 x Microwave Clear Plastic Food Takeaway Heavy Duty Containers with Lids, Freezer & Dish Washer Safe - 500ml
features: HEAVY DUTY & DURABLE: Securepack Containers Made from high-quality, heavy-duty plastic for exceptional strength and durability.
MICROWAVE SAFE: Suitable for reheating food in the microwave without compromising container integrity.
FREEZER SAFE: Can be safely used for storing food in the freezer, maintaining freshness and preventing freezer burn.
DISHWASHER SAFE: Convenient for easy cleaning and reuse, making post-meal cleanup a breeze.
SECURE LIDS: Includes airtight, snap-on lids to prevent spills and keep food fresh.
ECO-FRIENDLY: Made from non-CFC, recyclable materials and BPA-free plastic, ensuring safety and environmental responsibility.
VERSATILE SIZES: Each container holds 500ml, ideal for portioning meals, snacks, or leftovers.
VALUE PACK: Contains 50 containers, perfect for meal prepping, takeaway services, or bulk storage.
